name: Almond Cookies #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, sugar, and almond flavoring until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg and almond paste; beat thoroughly.
3. Add sifted dry ingredients; beat until well blended.
4. Chill dough for about 2 hours.
5. Form into balls using the palms of your hands; use about 1 level teaspoon of dough for each cookie.
6. Place cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Press gently with a small fruit glass that has been dipped in granulated sugar.
8. Bake at 350°F until delicately browned, about 12 minutes.
NOTE: You can also add 3/4 cup chopped fine almonds to give added flavor.
